name: DeepInfra
description: Registers DeepInfra as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback DeepInfra API token used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate fallback DeepInfra API key used when no api_key Plugin Setting or DEEPINFRA_TOKEN is configured.

settings.label: DeepInfra API key
settings.description: DeepInfra API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to DEEPINFRA_TOKEN, then DEEPINFRA_API_KEY.

providers.name: DeepInfra
providers.description: Refreshes DeepInfra chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
